changelog: Update prompt: Added a Dismiss button to the "Opening installer" stage. If you cancel the system installer screen on your device, you can now back out of the in-app update prompt instead of being stuck. BACK button also dismisses this stage now.
All v1.44.42 → v1.44.47 features: Are-you-done prompt, Clear All, tombstone deletion across devices, 14-day prune, auto-focus first CW tile, orphan blank-card auto-clean, blank-title save telemetry.
